title_zh: 尖沙咀那间会议室的冷气
title_en: The Air Conditioning in That Tsim Sha Tsui Meeting Room
summary_zh: 尖沙咀一间写字楼，冷气吹在后颈上，对面是我的合作方。
summary_en: A tower in Tsim Sha Tsui, AC on the back of my neck, Asia Miles across the table.

title_en: Sweaty Palms on the First Day
summary_zh: 共享空间的工位，我打开Notion搭框架。
summary_en: A co-working desk, rent just over a thousand a month. I opened Notion and started building.

title_zh: 对面打了个哈欠的那个下午
title_en: The Afternoon Someone Yawned Across the Table
summary_zh: 讲到第八页，对面打了个哈欠，没看我，在看窗外。
summary_en: Page eight of the deck, the person across yawned, not looking at me, looking out the window.

title_zh: 那通被挂掉三次的电话
title_en: The Phone Call They Hung Up On Three Times
summary_zh: 那通电话被挂了三次，第四次对方终于听完，说再发个资料看看。
summary_en: They hung up three times. The fourth call, they finally listened and said, send materials.

title_en: The Interviewer Asked If I Knew Cars
summary_zh: 面试官问我懂不懂车，我说不太懂，但可以学。
summary_en: The interviewer asked if I knew cars. I said not really, but I can learn.

title_en: Line 2 to Line 6, Forty Minutes Each Way
summary_zh: 2号线转6号线，单程四十分钟，我靠着铁柱子数工卡。
summary_en: Line 2 to Line 6, forty minutes each way. I leaned against the pole, counting badges.

title_zh: 你说你想自己做一个东西
title_en: You Said You Wanted to Build Something
summary_zh: Flora把花甲壳吐在桌上，说最差的情况就是钱烧完了什么都没做出来。
summary_en: Flora spat clam shells on the table. Worst case, she said, burn the money with nothing to show.

title_zh: 装修第八十三天，我盯着账单说不出话
title_en: On the Eighty-Third Day of Renovation, I Stared at the Bill Without a Word
summary_zh: 水管走线多了一千八，老周在旁边抽完烟，扔掉烟蒂一脚踩灭。
summary_en: Day eighty-three of renovation. Plumbing rerun, eighteen hundred more. Lao Zhou crushed his cigarette.

title_zh: 调酒师试到第九版，岳麓山的薄雾才出来
title_en: On the Ninth Try, the Mist of Yuelu Mountain Finally Came Out
summary_zh: 试到第九版才点头，把杯子推到我面前，是灰蒙蒙的紫。
summary_en: Xiao Tang nodded on the ninth try, pushed the glass over. A grayish purple.

title_en: Wuyi Square Was Full of Young People
summary_zh: 在茶颜悦色的一次闲聊，让我发现一个被忽略的需求。
summary_en: A casual chat at a teahouse uncovered a demand no one was serving.

title_zh: 灯关了大半，台灯还亮着
title_en: Most Lights Off, the Desk Lamp Still On
summary_zh: 入职第一天，老板让我三十天搭出一套品牌体系。
summary_en: Day one on the job: build an entire brand system in thirty days.

title_zh: 那只企鹅近看是一张人脸
title_en: Up Close, That Penguin Had a Human Face
summary_zh: 设计评审上吵了两小时，最后我指着一只有人脸的企鹅说，我们就选这个。
summary_en: Two hours of arguing in a design review. Then I pointed at a penguin with a human face.

title_zh: 活动结束，那个妈妈说了句哦
title_en: After the Session, That Mom Just Said Oh
summary_zh: 第一场活动结束，一个妈妈说了句"哦"就走了。
summary_en: After the first session, a mom said "oh" and walked away.

title_zh: 我弃掉了那个最完美的选题
title_en: I Threw Out the Perfect Topic
summary_zh: 有一天晚上，AI给我列了三十多个选题，其中一个看起来特别完美。
summary_en: One night, AI gave me thirty-something topic ideas. One looked perfect.

title_zh: 楼下那家没有招牌的面馆
title_en: The Noodle Shop Below With No Sign
summary_zh: 客户问我能不能快一点出效果，我没有直接回答。
summary_en: A client asked if we could get results faster. I didn't answer directly.

title_zh: 凌晨两点多，我刷了很久朋友圈
title_en: Past Two in the Morning, Scrolling My Feed for Too Long
summary_zh: 为一条九宫格Plog失眠的那晚，我意识到自己在等一个回应来证明自己算数。
summary_en: The night I lost sleep over a nine-grid Plog, I realized I was waiting for a reply to prove I counted.
